findings.description: The knowledge file adds an explanatory annotation '— `name` 属性に `W99ZZ64.` のようなプレフィックスを付与' to the server-side code example. The source file shows the two code samples side by side without any such explanation of the naming convention difference.
findings.source_evidence: Source only shows code block with `name="W99ZZ64.date1"` with no accompanying text explaining it as a prefix pattern.

findings.description: The hints for s2 are missing property names that appear in the attributes table: `id`, `comment`, and `initialValueDesc`.
findings.source_evidence: Source attributes table lists id, domain, readonly, disabled, example, cssClass, nameAlias, format, locale, sample, maxlength, dataFrom, comment, initialValueDesc. Hints include most but omit id, comment, and initialValueDesc.
